untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-market price divergence detection and cross-market bid-ask spread comparison. Current indicator set does not support: (1) price divergence between two distinct markets/exchanges, (2) separate bid-ask spread tracking per market, (3) spread ratio comparison to divergence threshold. The signal logic is fundamentally multi-venue arbitrage which cannot be expressed with single-market OHLCV-based indicators.
translation_notes: This is a statistical arbitrage/market microstructure signal that requires real-time multi-exchange price and order book data. Attempted mapping of divergence_threshold (0.25%) and convergence_threshold (0.05%) to close price movements, but this is a lossy approximation. The core requirement—detecting price divergences across separate markets and comparing spreads proportionally to divergence—cannot be implemented with the provided single-market indicator set.
